name: Oven Roasted Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large plastic bag or bowl, add the onion soup mix, potatoes, and oil.
3. Seal the bag and shake until all ingredients are evenly coated with the potato mixture.
4. Transfer the potatoes (with the remaining oil) to a shallow baking or roasting pan.
5. Bake for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
6. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
